project.name: ai-coding-rules
project.description: CLI tool that generates AI coding rules for every agent from a single config

patterns.async-io: All file I/O must use async/await
patterns.custom-errors: Use custom error classes from utils/errors.ts
patterns.strategy-pattern: Generators use strategy pattern via BaseGenerator

structure.src/commands: CLI command handlers (init, generate, sync, doctor)

do: Write JSDoc comments for all public functions
Use custom error classes for error handling
guidelines: Follow the strategy pattern for generators
All generated files must include a watermark header
